summary: Iteration 2 E2E testing complete. Backend: 27/27 pytest tests passed (22 from iter 1 + 5 new: old-password rejection 401, new-password 'password' success, /api/brief/chat greeting on empty messages, /api/brief/chat multi-turn continuation, lead creation with source='ai_brief' + brief_transcript). Frontend: Portfolio shows all 5 updated projects (STAKE BLC, NEOTRADE, AI Clinic, DYNOVA, 3D Game) with metrics & descriptions; Home page projects section shows the same 5 projects; No Calendly mentions found anywhere. Contact page defaults to 'AI Brief' mode, auto-fetches greeting from BriefBot ('Hi — what are you looking to build...'), no duplicate greeting (StrictMode guard verified — assistant message count stayed at 1 after 2s wait), user reply via brief-input + brief-send triggered contextual second turn ('Who are the primary users and buyers...'), AI/Form toggle works both directions. Admin login with NEW password 'password' succeeds (JWT 163 chars stored in localStorage); old password 'Filinex@2026' properly rejected (no token stored). Vercel files exist (/app/vercel.json, /app/api/index.py, /app/api/requirements.txt, /app/.vercelignore, /app/DEPLOY_VERCEL.md). No console errors except one expected 401 on /api/admin/me after manual token removal.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/brief/chat replays full thread as a single contextual user message instead of using the LlmChat session memory — works but means token cost grows linearly with turn count. Acceptable for a 4-6 turn brief; flag if conversations get longer.

EMERGENT_LLM_KEY presence is checked but no rate-limit or per-IP throttle is applied to /api/brief/chat. A bot could exhaust budget. Consider adding a simple per-session message cap (e.g., max 12 turns) and per-IP rate limit before production.

Contact page Form-mode toggle re-mounts AIBriefAssistant when switching back, which would re-fetch the greeting. Verified greeting fetch is idempotent in this test (no duplicates), but a useRef-based 'has-bootstrapped' guard inside AIBriefAssistant would be more robust if a user toggles repeatedly. Currently passing.

frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL still points to 'innovation-hub-225.preview.emergentagent.com' while review request mentioned 'e17ee658-...' — both URLs work since backend is hosted on the same cluster; frontend uses the env value so all integrations work.
test_credentials: admin@filinex.com / password (NEW, from /app/memory/test_credentials.md — verified working). Old password 'Filinex@2026' verified rejected (401).
seed_data_creation: Pytest created a few TEST_-prefixed leads and newsletter entries; lifecycle test self-cleans via DELETE; a few TEST_ leads remain (harmless). New: a TEST_AI_Brief lead with source='ai_brief' and brief_transcript was created for verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (27 tests, ~6s with xdist). Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. ADMIN_PASSWORD='password' (NEW). AI Brief endpoint POST /api/brief/chat takes {session_id, messages:[{role,content}]} — empty messages returns greeting, non-empty replays thread to LLM. LLM is real (gpt-5.4 via emergentintegrations + EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in backend/.env) — calls succeed but cost real budget. UI testids: contact-mode-ai/form, brief-input, brief-send, brief-reset, brief-msg-{role}-{i}, brief-final-name, brief-final-email, brief-submit, admin-email, admin-password, admin-login-submit.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in iteration 2. All requested changes (new admin password, 5 new projects on home + portfolio, AI Brief assistant on Contact page with toggle, Vercel deployment files) verified working end-to-end.
